projects.title: Celebrity Ascent Dining Planner
projects.description: Plan your cruise dinner ahead of time for a family up to 4.
projects.readMore: Loaded with dinner meals from the Panama Canal & Southern Caribbean · 11 Nights · March 16, 2026 sailing.  Click through each night and tag your selections for yourself, spouse and kids.  Click the Overview to see the plan!

projects.title: ETF to Commodity Price Link
projects.description: Calculate TSX ETF prices linked to their commodity pair such as gold.
projects.readMore: Fetches live price, lets you understand relative prices when markets are closed

projects.title: Breakeven Tranche Calculator
projects.description: Calculate breakeven point for Sell and Rebuy tranche scenarios.
projects.readMore: Test out scenarios for your ETF breakeven price, and how much the price needs to move to hit your target profit or loss.

projects.title: Ascent Meal Plan Analysis
projects.readMore: Standalone advanced meal planner, import the JSON file from the Ascent Dining Planner.

projects.title: Deadlock Soundboard (Paige)
projects.description: A collection of voice lines for Valve's Deadlock game.
projects.note: Sound files not included, they must be added from your local game files
projects.readMore: A soundboard for the voice lines of the character Paige in Valve's Deadlock game.  It also includes an event announcement feature.

projects.title: Retirement Estimator
projects.description: Given CAGR assumptions, determine optimal income withdrawal rate.
